content:
# Synthesis

**Summary**: The chemical process of creating a compound or substance.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-musa|Musa, 2015]] performed synthesis of cross-linked polyzwitterions and dianionic polyelectrolytes.

- [[2016-salawu|Salawu, 2016]] employed biosynthesis to produce silver and iron nanoparticles using plant extracts as reducing agents.

## Instruments and Software



- [[2016-salawu|Salawu, 2016]] employed biosynthesis to produce silver and iron nanoparticles using plant extracts as reducing agents.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Successfully synthesized CPZ, CPZDA, and HCDAP using different initiators (TBHP and AIBN). ([[2015-musa|Musa, 2015, p. 114]])

- Biosynthesized particles are more environmentally friendly than those produced via traditional chemical methods. ([[2016-salawu|Salawu, 2016, p. 43]])
